vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: I am often drawn to landscapes that possess a certain aesthetic appeal, characterized by symmetry and vibrant natural hues.

vocab.meaning: sự hùng vĩ bao quát (của tầm nhìn rộng)
vocab.example: Standing at the edge of the cliff, I tried to capture the panoramic grandeur of the canyon stretching toward the horizon.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp phù du (chóng tàn, chỉ xuất hiện trong khoảnh khắc)
vocab.example: Photography allows me to freeze the ephemeral beauty of a double rainbow before it vanishes into the clouds.

vocab.meaning: sự giao thoa giữa ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: The most compelling scenery photos often rely on the dramatic play of light and shadow during the early morning hours.

vocab.meaning: phông nền tĩnh lặng, bình yên
vocab.example: The mist-covered lake provided a serene backdrop that made the entire composition feel incredibly peaceful.

vocab.meaning: địa hình hiểm trở, gồ ghề
vocab.example: I find that capturing the rugged terrain of the highlands adds a sense of raw power and adventure to my portfolio.

vocab.meaning: vật kỷ niệm bằng hình ảnh
vocab.example: Whenever I visit a new country, I take landscape shots to serve as a visual memento of the places that moved me.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí gợi cảm xúc
vocab.example: The abandoned lighthouse surrounded by crashing waves created an evocative atmosphere that was perfect for a dramatic shot.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che chắn/gián đoạn
vocab.example: The observatory offers an uninterrupted view of the valley, allowing for some truly spectacular wide-angle photography.

vocab.meaning: bố cục mang tính nghệ thuật
vocab.example: Instead of just snapping a quick picture, I spend time on the artistic composition to ensure the leading lines draw the eye into the frame.
